---

Replace the `Closes #` line above with `Closes #<issue-number>` to auto-close the linked issue when this PR merges. Alternate patterns:

- `Refs #<issue-number>` — link to an issue without closing it
- `No related issue: <reason>` — orphan PR (drift sweep, hotfix, refactor)

Use one closing keyword per issue; cross-repo uses `Closes <owner>/<repo>#<issue-number>`. For the full list of supported keywords, see [GitHub's documentation on linking a pull request to an issue](https://docs.github.com/en/issues/tracking-your-work-with-issues/linking-a-pull-request-to-an-issue).
